about.heading: I'm Carlos Noguez, a Senior Software Engineer specialized in Flutter — shipping cross-platform products for fintech, healthcare, and consumer companies
about.description: Senior Software Engineer specialized in Flutter, with 6+ years shipping cross-platform products for fintech, healthcare, and consumer companies across iOS, Android, web, and desktop. Strong background in Clean Architecture, BLoC, and Riverpod; used to leading small teams, making architecture calls, and carrying releases through to the App Store and Google Play. AI tools are part of my daily workflow for debugging, testing, documentation, and code review — architecture and technical decisions stay human-driven.

projects.title: Clarika
projects.description: Led Flutter across two client projects (Leiton, Sipssa): greenfield mobile+web app from architecture to release, CI/CD automation, and health improvements on an existing codebase.

projects.title: Ligo
projects.description: Led Flutter on B2C/B2B mobile banking apps — payments, card management, banking APIs/SDKs, Clean Architecture standards, mentoring, and release ownership under real transaction load.

projects.title: Leistung Greta
projects.description: Lead Flutter on a medical equipment traceability platform — legacy refactor, new services, production reliability, and end-to-end App Store / Google Play releases.

projects.title: Betterfly
projects.description: Delivered 20+ wellbeing and financial-health screens with business logic in a large multi-team Flutter codebase; partnered with design, reviewed PRs, and kept production stable.

projects.title: Ultrix Labs LLC
projects.description: Lead Flutter for an R&D internal app; shipped a shared design-system package and mentored a team of 2 developers.

projects.title: Geminus
projects.description: Flutter across Prodismo, Senior Living EAP, and Trivium — features and controllers, push notifications, PubNub chat/calls, UI implementation, and growing test coverage.

projects.title: Click & Correct
projects.description: Built the product end to end for mobile and web: file/video uploads, localization, push notifications, Stripe with Apple/Google Pay, and store releases.

projects.title: UnoExpress
projects.description: Built package-traceability features for shipments USA–Honduras (air, sea, road), supporting logistics workflows in production.
